summary: Soundboard recording with a solid guitar mix and a standout Bird Song, but the overall performance is uneven and at times uninspired.
review: The show captures a clean soundboard feed that highlights a pleasing guitar balance and an unusual Vince‑Bruce keyboard swap on “Miracle.” While reviewers rave about an exemplary Bird Song and tight band interplay in spots, they also criticize a generally lackluster second set and note Jerry’s missing solo during “Stella Blue,” leaving the performance feeling mixed.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording quality is praised (good guitar mix, interesting keyboard swap) while show quality receives mixed feedback – strong Bird Song vs. overall uninspired feel and a low‑star review pulling the average down.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Guitar mix is highlighted as a positive; keyboards feature a unique Vince/Bruce swap on “Miracle.” No major clarity or balance issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as uneven – moments of tight improvisation contrast with an overall uninspired second set and a notable missed solo by Jerry.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Skipped his solo slot in the middle of “Stella Blue,” which reviewers called out negatively, though he was noted to be determined to make up for it later.
band_member_comments.Keys: Vince and Bruce swapped keyboards on “Miracle,” a unique moment highlighted by listeners.
